infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: AutoMate uses your camera to take photos of receipts and your vehicle.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: AutoMate accesses your photo library to attach receipt images to events.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: AutoMate uses your location to identify nearby gas stations and service shops.
